variants: Amari Larkin, who works in Turkish morphology, hails from Foxbriar Village and now lives in Hawkstone Quarters. She completed her education at the Thornhaven Technical Institute, where she specialized in her field of study. Now employed at Kaleidoscope Curation, Amari applies her linguistic skills to her professional projects. Her journey from small-town beginnings to her current role reflects her dedication and passion for language.
